titleStmt.title: SII 22.330: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 330. (A.R. No. 330 of 1906) NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT, WALAJAPET TALUK, TIRUMĀLPURAM. RUINED VISHṆU TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL. RĀJĀDHIRĀJADĒVA (I)—32nd YEAR (A.D. 1049-50)

summary.p: The inscription is much damaged. It begins with the introduction Tiṅgaḷēr taru etc. It registers a sale of land free of taxes, by the Ūrār of Amaṇpākkam in Paḷugūr-nāḍu a division of Maṇaiyiṟkōṭṭam in Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa maṇḍalam in favour of god Uyyakkoṇḍāḻvār at Gōvindapāḍi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tiṅkaḷertaru taṉṟoṅkal veṇkuṭaikkiḻ nilamaka ṇilava malarmakaṭ puṇarntu ceṅkoloccik karuṅkali kaṭintut taṉ tirutamaiyaṉ tirumakaṉ tiruvarai maṇimakuṭam cūṭṭik kaṉṉikāva kāṉaiyum Oruvaṉukkaḷittu porucilai ceralan velaikeḻu kāntaḷūrccālai ka
lamaṟuppittilaṅkaiyaṟkaraicaiyum Ālaṅkal vallavaṉaiyum kaṉṉakucciyar kāvalaṉaiyum poṉmaṇimuṭit talai kaṭintu kaṉnoṭippaṭai ṉ nāṭaka karipuraṉtaraṉṉāṭaiyiṟ kamiḻapparaṇi ko ṇataṭāṉṉār tara neṭu vāṉa vijayaṉ veruneḷittañci yoṭat tāṉā pitāvai mātāvoṭu maccāmataviḷaṅkuni
ṭappūṇ Iveñcamattappaṭuttap paṭai Āhavamallan payattoṭu varaviku Oṟṟarai veruppa ṟumallaṉ ḷamantraṉneṉṉanneḻu piṉṉait taṉ pulikkoṭippaṭaiṉā roṭṭalāhava ṇavaraicaik kaṭalpuraic ciṟutuṟai teyva vāṉantiyenṟu tuṟai munṟilumuḷar puṉalūr ṟuṅkavaṟettak kariyil perukam Eṟṟamuti
yār jayastambha niṟutti tankaḻal maṇinātamaḻakum Araicarkaḷaiyuñ ceṇṭāṭi poriyum toṉnalar teṉnetippiṟakkamum ntu virallaviṭuṉaṭuttu vaṉmel puraviṉuḷ m kāḷitāsaṉum viḷampa cātārccākkaṇṭaṉum pokkaḷamayaṉum killavā ṉum muttitāmula Irā teriyalpoka Avvayarpone kūttāḷava
malarppaḷa tārttayilppantaḷantu munta kāṇaṟkaiviṉ kuṟṟaiyai muṉṉuṭaiya kuttu yilāmayil vallaraicarai tu taṉ pūrva ṇenap pukuntu Aṇ kaḷitta taṭamuṭi viṭṭuk kuṭuttana muṭikki kuṭutta 5 100 takaivatai ṟattu tu tuṟaipuṉaliraṭṭapāṭi Erimaṭu
koṇṭu viśvalokattu viḷaṅku maṉuneṟi viṟ
ṟirunta jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻan Uyarnta perumpukaḻ kovirājakecari panmarāṉa śrī rājātirājadevarkku yāṇṭu 3 10 2vatu
yaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu maṇaiyiṟkoṭṭattu paḷurkkūṟnāṭṭu Amaṇpākkattūrom veḷāṉ ccaḷār ja
tānappaḷḷi teviyār viman toṇṭi vaitta Ikkoṭṭattup puricai nāṭṭu śrī koviñcap
pāṭiyil Eḻuntaruḷaviytta veḷḷittirumeni Uyyakkoṇṭāḻvār kku vi
ṟṟukkuṭutta nilamāvātu Eṅkaḷur nilam pālāṟṟukku teṉkaraiyil kiḻpāṟkel
mmitevanallūr Ellaikku meṟkkun teṉpāṟkel
maiyūr Ellaikku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai ciṟṟiyāṟṟū rellaikkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai pālāṟṟukkut teṟkum Iṉṉānku Ellaikaḷu makappaṭṭa viḷainilamum kollai nilamum E
ṅkaḷ nilamāṉa tenkaraiyiluḷḷatellā Eṟṟaccū
rakkum Uḷḷaṭaṅka viḷainilamum kollaiyum Ella
viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇañ ceytukuṭuttom śrī kovintapā
ṭi Uyyakkoṇṭāḻvārkku Amaṇpākkattūrom Iṉnilam
viṟṟukkuṭuttu koḷḷa Uṭaiya vilaipporuḷu muṟṟum Āvaṇakka
ḷariye kaiyccelakkoṇṭu Iṉnilam viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇam ceytu
kuṭuttom Iṉnilattukku Ituve vilaiyāvaṇamum poruḷmāvaṟu
tip poruṭcilavolaiyum Ituveyākavum Ituvalla(talla)tu ve
ṟu poruḷmāvaṟutip poruṭcilaolai kāṭṭakkaṭavāṉ
caintu vilaipporuḷaṟakkoṇṭu vilaikkaṟa viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇañ cey
tu kuṭuttom śrī kovintapāṭi Uyyakkoṇṭāḻvārkku Amaṇpākka muṭai
yāṉ nilattāl vanta Iṟai Epperppaṭṭitum nāṅkaḷe I
ṟaiiḻicci śrī kovintapāṭi Uyyakkoṇṭāḻvārkku
kkoḷḷappeṟuvārkaḷākavum Iṉnilam Āṭcike
Ipparicu Icaintu vilaipporuḷaṟakkoṇṭu vi
śrī kovintapāṭi Āḻvārkku tevatānamāka Iṟaiyiḻi
tom Amaṇpākkattūrom Ivarkaḷ colla Eḻutinen
pirāmaṇan parañcoti vaiykuntapaṭṭaneṉ Ivai yenneḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 22.330 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
